tests.name: Backend Test Suite - conftest.py URL fix
tests.details: Created conftest.py to load REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from frontend/.env. 298 errors eliminated.

tests.name: Backend Test Suite - assertion updates
tests.details: Fixed 13 outdated test assertions across 8 files (API evolution mismatches). 345 tests pass.

tests.name: API /auto-trade/analytics schema
tests.details: Returns 20 keys: total_trades, win_rate, avg_win, avg_loss, avg_r_multiple, total_pnl, max_drawdown, long_vs_short, by_setup_type, by_confidence_band, by_session, pnl_curve, skip_reasons, rejection_reasons, slippage, execution_timing

tests.name: API /auto-trade/trade-log enhanced schema
tests.details: Returns logs with new fields: executed, skip_reason, slippage, slippage_pct, signal_timestamp, execution_timestamp, time_elapsed_ms, actual_entry_price, actual_exit_reason

tests.name: API /auto-trade/scan lt_pipeline field
tests.details: Returns lt_pipeline with 8 keys: total_evaluated, fundamental_passed, valuation_passed, timing_passed, final_candidates, rejection_reasons, top_missed, confidence_distribution

tests.name: API /auto-trade/scan momentum_diagnostics field
tests.details: Returns momentum_diagnostics with 4 keys: total_momentum_candidates, total_momentum_bypassed, total_near_misses, top_near_misses (each with symbol, rel_vol, spread_pct, vwap_above, blocked_conditions)

tests.name: Frontend Analytics tab renders
tests.details: Summary stats, Win/Loss, Long vs Short, Slippage, Execution Timing cards all render correctly

tests.name: Frontend LT Pipeline tab renders
tests.details: Funnel visualization, confidence distribution, rejection reasons, top 10 missed opportunities

tests.name: Frontend Momentum Diagnostics tab renders
tests.details: Summary cards, near-miss candidates list with blocked conditions

tests.name: Execution Validation Logging _log_trade
tests.details: Enhanced to capture signal_timestamp, execution_timestamp, time_elapsed_ms, expected vs actual price, slippage, slippage_pct

tests.name: Execution Validation Logging _log_skip
tests.details: New method logs all skipped signals with skip_reason, classification, signal metadata to trade_log collection

tests.name: Exit reason tracking
tests.details: Closed trades now capture actual_exit_reason field

action_item_for_main_agent: All 5 features implemented and verified. Backend test suite at 100% (345 tests). No regressions detected.
